channel.title: Plugin on FantasyMaps
channel.description: Recent content in Plugin on FantasyMaps

item.title: OFM Unreal
item.description: An Unreal Engine plugin that consumes an Open Fantasy Maps style and assembles a scene hierarchy from its layers — at runtime or in-editor. Filters layers, evaluates Mapbox-style expressions, maps map features to actors via Blueprints, and pulls live overlays from geomqtt. The bridge that puts the atlas inside the engine where the game already runs. The Unity counterpart lives at OFM Unity. Repository

item.title: OFM Unity
item.description: The Unity counterpart of OFM Unreal: an in-engine bridge that takes an Open Fantasy Maps style and walks its layers into a Unity scene. Layer filtering, feature-to-prefab mapping, and live overlay updates over geomqtt. Repository
